\section*{SCC Branch Successor Pilot}

\addcontentsline{toc}{section}{SCC Branch Successor Pilot}



This generated packet is an L2 branch-pilot shell. It is not a supersession of the canonical SCC Branch Book. It tests conditional structural counterfactual-capacity closure through the MCS, UC, and TSI packet, without importing phenomenological, conscious, or experiential content.



\subsection*{Pilot posture}

Computed SCC posture: \textbf{conditional-cert-close}. The pilot preserves structural counterfactual capacity only; no phenomenological endpoint is asserted.
